subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast approached the sweet spring of mystic knowledge! Divine Reality is sanctified and exalted above all attributes and descriptions of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای وارد بر منهل عذب عرفان حقیقت الوهیت مقدس و منزه از هر اوصاف و نعوت عالم
subcodes.subjects: @spirit of faith [ruh-i-'iman], @Manifestation of God as mediator, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
